the students must solve the equation -2x³ + 3x² + 36x - 20 = 50 to find the number of years when the performance score reaches exactly 50. this involves rearranging the equation to -2x³ + 3x² + 36x - 70 = 0 and solving for x. the students should use numerical methods or graphing tools to approximate the solution.  

the students need to determine the range of x where -2x³ + 3x² + 36x - 20 > 60. this requires solving the inequality -2x³ + 3x² + 36x - 80 > 0. the solution will involve analyzing the graph of the polynomial or using a table of values to find the intervals where the inequality holds true. the students should ensure that all lowercase words are used no more than three times and that no two adjacent words start with consecutive letters.
